summary: Full-stack e2e review (backend + frontend) of TrendTracker Pro after major refactor. 18/18 pytest backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified via Playwright: landing sections, plans purchase (external URL open + toast), signup->membership modal, KYC PDF upload, admin panel with 7 stats + 6 tabs (Users/Payments/KYC/Plans/Stocks/Emails).

issues: 'Loading admin data...' text remains visible for a moment even after stat cards render — cosmetic only, harmless

Save buttons for each plan card use text 'Save changes' without a per-plan data-testid (e.g. 'save-plan-growth'). Works, but review request expected such a testid — consider adding for finer-grained UI tests.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid='save-plan-<id>' on each Save button inside PlansAdmin.jsx for easier per-plan UI assertions.
(Optional) Suppress the 'Loading admin data...' text once stats have arrived, so it doesn't briefly overlap with the loaded stats.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~650 lines and now covers auth+plans+stocks+payments+KYC+admin. Consider splitting into routers/ modules (auth.py, admin.py, kyc.py) as it will keep growing.
Purchase flow correctly writes a pending payment and does NOT grant credits — matches new async spec.
MongoDB _id is properly stripped via strip_id() everywhere.
JWT secret is loaded from env; admin bootstrap is idempotent.
kyc_submit only accepts application/pdf — good. No size cap on the server side (frontend claims 10 MB); consider adding a server-side max size check.
admin_kyc_status accepts 'pending' as a valid status via query param — that could re-open an already-approved KYC. Not blocking but worth a check.
Admin toggle uses query param `active=false` on PATCH — works, but a JSON body would be more RESTful.
updated_files: /app/memory/test_credentials.md (updated to reflect admin@tredtracker.net and async purchase flow)
test_credentials: Admin: admin@tredtracker.net / admin@123. Test users created dynamically with TEST_ prefix via /api/auth/signup.
seed_data_creation: Backend startup seeds: admin user, 4 plans (starter/growth/premium/ultimate), 8 stocks (AAPL/MSFT/NVDA/TSLA/AMZN/META/GOOGL/SPY). Tests create TEST_ prefixed users, a pending payment (approved during test), a KYC submission (approved), a temp plan and a temp stock (both deleted at end).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 pytest cases run against the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Purchase flow is async: expect POST /api/membership/purchase to return external_payment_url with status='pending', then PATCH /api/admin/payments/{id}/approve to grant credits. Frontend membership modal is data-testid='membership-modal' and auto-opens after signup redirect (/dashboard?welcome=1). Note: nav intentionally has NO Admin link — testing it should assert absence.
mocked_apis_verified: Email log via db.email_logs — verified writes for payment_initiated, membership_confirmation, kyc_status, account_status.
External payment window.open('https://penmarksolutions.net/plan.php') — verified via patched window.open in Playwright.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing tests. All flows behave per spec.
